claims.claim: UCM uses AI-assisted planning to reduce administrative waste and build clearer, more efficient cleaning scopes.
claims.conditions: Explain that trained people deliver and approve the service.

claims.claim: UCM saves customers a stated percentage through AI.
claims.conditions: Requires verified baseline, methodology, sample size and approval.

claims.claim: UCM is the cheapest cleaning company in London.
UCM traces its operating history to Universal Technical Cleaning, founded in 1994.
claims.conditions: Use one consistent founding statement across channels.

claims.claim: Name or display a historic prestigious client in a campaign.
claims.conditions: Requires documentary evidence and permission for the exact use.

claims.claim: A UCM service, product or process is environmentally preferable.
claims.conditions: Specify the exact product or process and retain evidence under the CMA Green Claims Code.
